title: Disagreement Over Lebanon’s Inclusion in Cease-Fire Threatens to Unravel It
summary_full: The U.S. says the deal didn’t include the country, but Iran says it did. Israel is bombarding Lebanon, and Iran wants to show it supports its allies.
summary_public: The U.S. says the deal didn’t include the country, but Iran says it did. Israel is bombarding Lebanon, and Iran wants to show it supports its allies.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran wants to show it supports its allies
